name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Cabas 16 series tote
Large tote body + simple opening design, making the whole bag concise and generous, lightweight, large capacity, and easy to open. Compared to the old Soft version, this one is more practical! Perfect for daily work or business trips, short trips, or even as a mommy bag.
Capacity: Extra-large capacity~
Model: 112583
Dimensions: 37-15-27cm
